paper_title: CULTURAL APPROACH: A POTENTIAL PEDAGOGY FOR PROMOTING LEARNERS' INSIGHTS INTO CULTURAL ASPECTS IN LITERARY WORKS

entities.description: A pedagogy for promoting learners' insights into cultural aspects in literary works.
A literary theory and critical approach that considers literature as a product of its historical context.
The research design used to analyze authors' viewpoints and literary works.
A literary work by Harriet Beecher Stowe used as experimental material for analysis.
A literary work by William Faulkner used as experimental material for analysis.
A literary work by Kate Chopin used as experimental material for analysis.
The study of how literature is culture-bound and reflects societal values.
The target learning outcome of using a cultural approach in pedagogy.
Specific cultural context analyzed within The Awakening.
The main field of study involving teaching methods for literature and culture.
Researcher from Can Tho University of Medicine-Pharmacy.
Researcher from the School of Foreign Languages, Can Tho University.
Researcher from the School of Social Sciences & Humanities, Can Tho University.
